  design_intent: "High-power, cold-tolerant LFP cell for Arctic microgrid"

envelope:
  external:
    cell_height_mm: 100.0
    cell_width_mm: 200.0
    cell_thickness_mm: 25.0
  walls:
    wall_top_mm: 1.5
    wall_bottom_mm: 1.0
    wall_front_back_mm: 0.5
    wall_sides_mm: 0.7
  internals:
    insulation_coating_um: 100.0
    external_corner_radius_mm: 2.0
    internal_corner_radius_mm: 1.5

stack_config:
  architecture:
    num_stacks: 1
    electrode_pairs_per_stack: 30
    end_electrode_config: "BothNegative"
  sheet_geometry:
    cathode_height_mm: 88.0
    cathode_width_mm: 185.0
    anode_offset_top_mm: 2.0
    anode_offset_bottom_mm: 2.0
    anode_offset_left_mm: 2.0
    anode_offset_right_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_top_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_bottom_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_left_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_right_mm: 2.0

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "LFP"
    loading_mg_cm2: 15.0
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 160.0
    collector_thickness_um: 14.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 60.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 60.0
    porosity_pct: 30.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 10.0
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 350.0
    collector_thickness_um: 8.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 70.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 70.0
    porosity_pct: 32.0
    np_ratio: 1.15
  separator:
    material_name: "Ceramic-coated PP"
    thickness_um: 16.0
    porosity_pct: 45.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.4
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC"
    salt_concentration_m: 1.2
    density_g_cm3: 1.22
    excess_factor: 1.1

current_collection:

      width_mm: 40.0
      thickness_mm: 0.3
    anode:
      material: "Nickel-plated copper"
      height_mm: 30.0
      width_mm: 40.0
      thickness_mm: 0.2

packaging:

    case_density_g_cm3: 2.70
    lid_thickness_mm: 2.0
  insulation:
    shell_thickness_um: 120.0
    shell_count: 2
